title: Inflation will likely be higher for longer. Your retirement plan isn’t built for that.
summary: The article examines how inflation is expected to persist longer than anticipated, with double-digit increases in healthcare, insurance, and energy costs not fully reflected in official CPI figures. Traditional retirement strategies may not adequately account for these sustained inflationary pressures, potentially undermining portfolio growth.
content: Official CPI masks double-digit spikes in healthcare, insurance and energy. Meanwhile, an outdated strategy quietly drains your portfolio.

zh.title: 通胀可能会更高且持续更长。你的退休计划未为此做准备。
zh.summary: 该文章分析了通货膨胀预计会比预期持续更长时间，医疗、保险和能源成本的两位数增长未完全反映在官方CPI数据中。传统退休策略可能无法充分应对这些持续的通胀压力，可能会削弱投资组合增长。

title: What CEOs from Tesla, Nvidia and over a dozen other companies hope to gain by joining Trump in China
summary: President Trump is bringing executives from 17 major U.S. companies, including Tesla and Nvidia, to China, signaling potential business opportunities and negotiations. The visit indicates efforts to strengthen commercial ties between the U.S. and China despite ongoing trade tensions.
content: On his visit to China this week, President Donald Trump is bringing along at least 17 executives from prominent U.S. companies. Here’s what it means for them.

zh.title: 特斯拉、英伟达等十多家公司的首席执行官期望通过与特朗普访华获得什么
zh.summary: 特朗普总统正在带领包括特斯拉和英伟达在内的17家主要美国公司的高管访华，表明潜在的商业机会和谈判。这次访问表明尽管存在持续的贸易紧张关系，但美国和中国之间正在加强商业联系。

title: AI-driven cyberattacks will start to be the 'new norm' in months, Palo Alto warns
summary: Palo Alto Networks warns that AI-powered cyberattacks are becoming increasingly sophisticated and will likely become routine within months. Organizations must accelerate their cybersecurity defenses to counter AI-driven threats that operate faster and more intelligently than traditional attacks.
content: The rise of increasingly sophisticated AI models is putting pressure on cybersecurity teams to step up their defenses for newer and faster cyberattacks.

zh.title: 帕洛阿尔托警告人工智能驱动的网络攻击将在数月内开始成为"新常态"
zh.summary: 帕洛阿尔托网络公司警告，人工智能驱动的网络攻击变得越来越复杂，可能在数月内成为常规。组织必须加快其网络安全防御，以应对比传统攻击更快、更智能运作的人工智能驱动威胁。

title: Trump in China: Traders predict a tariff truce extension and Boeing aircraft purchases
summary: Financial traders expect Trump's China visit will result in an extension of the current tariff truce and potential Boeing aircraft purchases by China. Traders also anticipate discussions about Iran policy despite Trump's previous statements that U.S. assistance isn't required from China.
content: Traders also think it is likely that the president will talk about Iran, despite his comments that the U.S. doesn't need China's help in resolving the war.

zh.title: 特朗普在中国：交易员预测关税休战延期和波音飞机采购
zh.summary: 金融交易员预期特朗普的中国访问将导致当前关税休战延期，以及中国可能购买波音飞机。交易员还预期会讨论伊朗政策，尽管特朗普之前表示美国不需要中国的援助。

title: This stock is our favorite way to hedge against the pickup in inflation
summary: The Investing Club identifies a specific stock as an effective hedge against rising inflation. The recommendation is part of the Homestretch, an actionable daily market update released at the final hour of trading.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 这只股票是我们应对通胀上升的最佳对冲方式
zh.summary: 投资俱乐部确定了一只特定股票作为应对通胀上升的有效对冲工具。该建议是Homestretch的一部分，Homestretch是在交易最后一小时发布的可操作的日常市场更新。

title: Cathie Wood’s flagship fund is largely missing out on a booming tech-fueled bull run
summary: Cathie Wood's flagship ETF, designed to invest in innovative and disruptive companies, has underperformed this year as technology and artificial intelligence stocks have surged. The fund's selective strategy appears to be missing significant gains from the current tech-led market rally.
content: Cathie Wood’s flagship ETF actively invests in shares of companies expected to be disruptive and innovative. But so far this year, the fund appears to be missing out on big gains tied to technology and artificial intelligence.

zh.title: 凯西·伍德的旗舰基金错过了科技推动的牛市繁荣
zh.summary: 凯西·伍德的旗舰ETF设计用于投资创新和颠覆性公司，但由于科技和人工智能股票飙升，其今年表现不佳。该基金的选择性策略似乎错过了当前科技主导市场反弹的巨大收益。

title: This low-profile stock in the semiconductor supply chain has doubled this year. Wall Street still loves it
summary: A relatively unknown semiconductor supply chain company (Qnity Electronics) has doubled in value this year, with Wall Street analysts maintaining bullish outlooks and raising price targets. The stock demonstrates strong fundamentals despite limited public visibility.
content: Across the board, Wall Street analysts are bullish on Qnity Electronics and have raised their price targets on the stock.

zh.title: 这支半导体供应链中的低调股票今年翻倍。华尔街仍然喜欢它
zh.summary: 一家相对不知名的半导体供应链公司（Qnity Electronics）今年价值翻倍，华尔街分析师保持乐观前景并上调价格目标。尽管公众知名度有限，但该股票展现了强劲的基本面。

title: This map shows the average credit score by state. Where does yours rank?
summary: CNBC Select analyzes average credit scores across U.S. states to show regional creditworthiness variations and identifies which states rank highest and lowest. The analysis includes practical tools and strategies for consumers to improve their personal credit scores.
content: CNBC Select takes a look at the states with the highest and lowest credit scores, and some tools to help improve your own

zh.title: 这张地图显示了各州的平均信用评分。你的排名如何？
zh.summary: CNBC Select分析了美国各州的平均信用评分，以展示地区信用度差异，并确定哪些州排名最高和最低。该分析包括消费者改善个人信用评分的实用工具和策略。

title: Trump’s China visit could rattle markets if it doesn’t bring an Iran breakthrough
summary: Trump's China visit carries market risks if it fails to produce a breakthrough on Iranian policy, as markets worry about potential renewed U.S. military action in the Middle East. Chinese cooperation on Iran negotiations is viewed as critical to preventing escalation.
content: There are concerns that a lack of Chinese intervention in the Iran conflict could prompt renewed U.S. military action as early as next week.

zh.title: 特朗普的中国访问如果未能在伊朗问题上取得突破，可能会动摇市场
zh.summary: 特朗普的中国访问如果未能在伊朗政策上取得突破，将面临市场风险，因为市场担心美国可能在中东重新采取军事行动。中国在伊朗谈判中的合作被视为防止升级的关键。

title: Tech is completely dominating the market. But these sectors could be poised to catch up
summary: While technology stocks have dominated recent market performance, analyst Frank Cappelleri identifies other S&P 500 sectors that may be positioned for stronger performance ahead. The analysis suggests potential sector rotation opportunities beyond technology stocks.
content: Frank Cappelleri breaks down the charts on these S&P 500 sectors.

zh.title: 科技完全主导市场。但这些部门可能准备好追上来了
zh.summary: 虽然科技股主导了近期的市场表现，分析师Frank Cappelleri指出其他标普500指数部门可能有更强劲的表现机会。该分析表明存在超越科技股的潜在行业轮换机会。

title: 10-year Treasury yield hits new high for the year after very hot producer prices reading
summary: The 10-year Treasury yield reached a new yearly high following a stronger-than-anticipated producer price index report, indicating inflation concerns are driving bond market movements. The reading suggests inflationary pressures remain elevated despite efforts to cool the economy.
content: Treasury yields climbed after a hotter-than-expected reading on the producer price index.

zh.title: 10年期美国国债收益率在生产者价格数据强劲后创年度新高
zh.summary: 在生产者价格指数报告强于预期后，10年期美国国债收益率创下年度新高，表明通胀担忧正在推动债券市场走势。数据表明，尽管经济降温努力，通胀压力仍然居高不下。

title: Gas tax holiday as Trump promises? Not so fast, trucking, construction industries say
summary: While President Trump has proposed a federal gas tax holiday, trucking and construction industries express skepticism about its effectiveness and warn it could harm road infrastructure maintenance. The debate highlights competing priorities between consumer relief and infrastructure investment.
content: President Donald Trump and lawmakers are eyeing federal gas tax relief, but opponents contend a pause wouldn't help consumers and could harm roads.

zh.title: 特朗普承诺的燃油税假期？货运和建筑业说没那么快
zh.summary: 尽管特朗普总统提出了联邦燃油税假期，货运和建筑业对其有效性表示怀疑，并警告它可能损害道路基础设施维护。这场辩论突出了消费者救济和基础设施投资之间的相互竞争的优先事项。

title: Roast my house, Reddit! Desperate home sellers are asking strangers for help getting offers.
summary: As housing inventory lingers on the market, some sellers are crowdsourcing feedback from Reddit users to understand buyer objections and improve their selling prospects. The trend reflects mounting frustration among homeowners struggling to close sales in a challenging real estate environment.
content: As homes linger on the market, sellers are inviting feedback on why buyers aren’t biting — even if it’s laced with insults.

zh.title: 在Reddit上吐槽我的房子！绝望的房屋卖家向陌生人寻求帮助以获得出价
zh.summary: 随着房屋库存在市场上滞留，一些卖家从Reddit用户那里众包反馈，以了解购房者的反对意见并改善销售前景。这一趋势反映了在充满挑战的房地产环境中努力完成销售的房主们日益增长的沮丧感。

title: My overseas flight costs $1,000. Is it better to wait until after the Iran war to buy my ticket?
summary: Geopolitical tensions involving Iran are impacting international flight prices, with consumers questioning whether to delay travel purchases until after potential military conflict resolves. The article explores how Middle East instability is driving up airfare costs even for non-regional routes.
content: Summer and fall travel, even for those not wanting to cross the ocean, will be pricier this year.

zh.title: 我的海外航班费用为$1,000。等到伊朗战争后再买机票会更好吗？
zh.summary: 涉及伊朗的地缘政治紧张局势正在影响国际航班价格，消费者质疑是否应该延迟旅游购买直到潜在的军事冲突解决。这篇文章探讨了中东不稳定如何推高航空运费，即使对非地区航线也是如此。

title: In pushing for ‘Rush Hour 4,’ Trump is acting like a shadow executive producer
summary: President Trump has been actively pushing to revive the "Rush Hour" franchise with a fourth installment, demonstrating his influence in entertainment beyond politics. The franchise, which last released a film in 2007, highlights Trump's expanding interests in media and entertainment production.
content: The “Rush Hour” franchise, starring Chris Tucker and Jackie Chan, has been dormant since 2007, but President Donald Trump has been pushing to get a fourth installment made.

zh.title: 在推动《尖峰时刻4》的过程中，特朗普表现得像一个影子制片人
zh.summary: 总统特朗普一直在积极推动复兴《尖峰时刻》特许经营权的第四部电影，展示了他在政治之外的娱乐影响力。这个特许经营权最后在2007年发布了一部电影，突出了特朗普在媒体和娱乐制作中不断扩大的兴趣。

title: Wholesale inflation jumps 6% in April on annual basis, biggest increase since 2022
summary: Wholesale prices, measured by the producer price index, jumped 6% year-over-year in April, marking the largest increase since 2022. This wholesale inflation is significant because it typically precedes and influences consumer price increases in the coming months.
content: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.5% in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

zh.title: 批发通胀四月同比上升6%，创2022年来最大增幅
zh.summary: 以生产者价格指数衡量的批发价格四月同比上升6%，为2022年来最大涨幅。这种批发通胀至关重要，因为它通常先于消费价格上升，并会影响未来几个月的消费者价格变动。

title: Alphabet is the top holding of this five-star fund that is also finding 240% gains in the ‘unsexy’ side of the AI buildout
summary: The Chase Growth Fund, a five-star rated fund, holds Alphabet as its top position and has achieved 240% gains in less high-profile segments of the AI industry. The fund's strategy of moving across market caps and investing in supporting infrastructure has outpaced the S&P 500 benchmark.
content: Moving across market caps has kept the Chase Growth Fund agile and one step ahead of the S&P 500.

zh.title: 字母表是这只五星基金的第一大持仓，在AI基础设施领域获得240%收益
zh.summary: 五星评级的Chase增长基金将字母表作为其第一大持仓，在AI产业的不太受关注的领域实现了240%的收益。该基金跨越不同市值投资并关注支持性基础设施的策略超越了标普500基准。

title: Trump arrives in Beijing with CEOs ahead of Xi meetings
summary: U.S. President Trump arrived in Beijing accompanied by American CEOs for a highly anticipated summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping. The visit represents a significant moment for U.S.-China diplomatic and business relations.
content: The president landed in the Chinese capital for a highly anticipated summit with Xi Jinping.

zh.title: 特朗普携美国首席执行官抵达北京，为与习近平会面做准备
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普携美国首席执行官抵达北京，参加与中国总统习近平备受期待的峰会。这次访问代表了美中外交和商务关系的重要时刻。

title: Wholesale prices jump to 4-year high and point to even more inflation in the next few months
summary: The producer price index surged 1.4% in April, reaching its highest level in four years and signaling ongoing inflationary pressures. This wholesale inflation is a key leading indicator that consumer prices may continue to rise in the coming months.
content: The latest look at wholesale prices points to even higher inflation in the next month or two. The producer price index jumped 1.4% in April to mark the biggest rise in four years.

zh.title: 批发价格跳升至四年高位，预示未来数月通胀将进一步加剧
zh.summary: 生产者价格指数在四月份飙升1.4%，达到四年来的最高水平，预示持续的通胀压力。这种批发通胀是一个关键的领先指标，表明消费者价格在未来几个月可能继续上升。

title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Micron, Amazon, AMD, Johnson & Johnson & more
summary: Wall Street released its biggest analyst calls on Wednesday, covering major companies including Nvidia, Apple, Micron, Amazon, AMD, and Johnson & Johnson. These calls shape investor sentiment and trading activity across key market sectors.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.

zh.title: 周三最大的分析师观点：英伟达、苹果、美光、亚马逊、AMD、强生等公司
zh.summary: 华尔街在周三发布了最大的分析师观点，涵盖英伟达、苹果、美光、亚马逊、AMD和强生等主要公司。这些观点影响投资者情绪和关键市场部门的交易活动。

title: 5 tests Kevin Warsh will face on the first day as Fed chair
summary: Kevin Warsh, newly appointed as Federal Reserve Chair, will immediately face critical tests including managing political pressure and securing support for his policy priorities. His handling of these early challenges will signal his approach to leading the central bank.
content: Wall Street and Washington will be watching to see how he reacts to political pressure and whether he can get the central bank on board with the major changes he favors.

zh.title: 凯文·沃什担任美联储主席第一天将面临的5个考验
zh.summary: 新任美联储主席凯文·沃什将立即面临关键考验，包括应对政治压力和争取对其政策优先事项的支持。他对这些早期挑战的处理将预示他领导中央银行的方式。

title: Oil price spike turmoil far from over, IEA says as inventories are depleted at “record pace"
summary: Global oil supplies declined further in April by 1.8 million barrels per day, and the International Energy Agency warns that oil market volatility is far from stabilizing. Inventories are being depleted at record pace, pointing to sustained elevated oil prices ahead.
content: The IEA's oil market report for May noted that global oil supply declined by a further 1.8 million barrels per day in April.

zh.title: 石油价格飙升困境远未结束，国际能源署称库存以"创纪录速度"耗尽
zh.summary: 全球油气供应在4月份进一步下降，日均减少180万桶，国际能源署警告称油市波动远未稳定。库存以创纪录速度耗尽，表明油价将长期保持高位。

title: Walmart cuts 1,000 roles to simplify operations, Reuters reports
summary: Walmart is cutting 1,000 positions as part of a broader restructuring under new CEO John Furner and a restructured leadership team. The layoffs reflect the retailer's strategic pivot toward technology-focused operations.
content: Under new CEO John Furner ​and a ​reshaped leadership team, the ​retailer is doubling down on a tech-focused strategy.

zh.title: 沃尔玛裁员1000人以简化运营，路透社报道
zh.summary: 沃尔玛在新首席执行官约翰·弗纳及重组后的领导团队领导下，裁减1000个职位，作为更大范围重组的一部分。这些裁员反映了这家零售商向技术驱动运营的战略转变。

title: Alibaba's core profit plunges 84% even as AI and cloud growth accelerate
summary: Alibaba reported that its core profit plummeted 84% during the March quarter despite acceleration in its AI and cloud computing segments. The profit decline reflects heavy capital investments in new technologies and e-commerce infrastructure.
content: Alibaba on Wednesday said its core profitability plunged in the March quarter amid heavy investments in tech and e-commerce.

zh.title: 阿里巴巴核心利润暴跌84%，尽管AI和云计算增长加速
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴报告称，尽管其AI和云计算业务加速发展，但3月季度核心利润暴跌84%。利润下降反映了该公司在新技术和电商基础设施上的大额资本投资。

title: 'Bond markets on edge' as King Charles sets out fragile UK government's agenda
summary: U.K. bond markets experienced heavy selling pressure in advance of the King's Speech as concerns about Prime Minister Starmer's government stability weighed on investor sentiment. Political uncertainty is creating volatility in gilt and bond markets.
content: U.K. gilts and bonds faced heavy selling pressure in response to the latest 'Starmer drama', as the prime minister faced down rivals ahead of the King's Speech.

zh.title: "债券市场紧张"，查尔斯国王阐述英国虚弱政府议程
zh.summary: 英国债券市场在国王演讲前经历了大幅抛售压力，对首相斯塔默政府稳定性的担忧加重了投资者情绪。政治不确定性正在造成金边债券和债券市场的波动。

title: Jamie Dimon warns JPMorgan may rethink new London office if 'very smart' Starmer is ousted as UK PM
summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon cautioned that the bank may reconsider its planned new London office expansion if Prime Minister Starmer is removed from office. His comments underscore how political stability in the UK affects major corporate investment decisions.
content: Starmer's leadership is under pressure, sparking concern in the bond market.

zh.title: 杰米·迪蒙警告：若"非常聪慧的"斯塔默被罢免，摩根大通可能重新评估伦敦新办公室计划
zh.summary: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·迪蒙警告说，如果首相斯塔默被撤销职位，该银行可能会重新考虑其计划中的伦敦新办公室扩建。他的言论强调了英国政治稳定性对大型企业投资决策的影响。

title: A U.S. push into the drones industry will drive big gains for this components maker, says Roth
summary: Investment firm Roth initiated buy coverage of a drone components manufacturer, predicting that increased U.S. government focus on the drone industry will drive significant gains. The move reflects growing conviction around commercial opportunities in aerospace supply chains.
content: The investment firm initiated coverage of the drone components maker with a buy rating.

zh.title: Roth称美国推进无人机产业将为该零部件制造商带来巨大收益
zh.summary: 投资公司Roth对一家无人机零部件制造商发起买入评级，预测美国政府对无人机产业的重视将驱动显著收益。此举反映了对航空航天供应链商业机会的日益增长的信心。

title: Mortgage rates move to highest level in 5 weeks, but homebuyers shake it off
summary: Mortgage rates climbed to their highest level in five weeks, yet homebuyer demand remained resilient with mortgage applications staying positive. The continued buyer interest suggests the market is absorbing higher rates without significant demand destruction.
content: Mortgage rates continued to climb higher, but stronger homebuyer demand helped to keep mortgage applications in positive territory.

zh.title: 抵押贷款利率升至5周来最高水平，但购房者不为所动
zh.summary: 抵押贷款利率升至五周来的最高水平，但购房者需求仍然强劲，抵押贷款申请保持积极。持续的购房者兴趣表明市场正在吸收更高利率，而没有造成需求的显著下降。

title: Shrinking Milka chocolate bar tricked consumers, says German court
summary: A German court in Bremen found the manufacturer of Milka Alpine Milk chocolate guilty of "shrinkflation"—reducing the product size while maintaining its price. The ruling highlights growing regulatory and consumer scrutiny of deceptive pricing practices.
content: A court in Bremen has found the manufacturer of the classic Alpine Milk chocolate bar guilty of "shrinkflation".

zh.title: 德国法院称缩小的美卡巧克力棒欺骗了消费者
zh.summary: 德国不来梅法院判定美卡阿尔卑斯牛奶巧克力的制造商犯有"缩水"罪名——减少产品大小但保持价格不变。该裁决突显了对欺骗性定价做法日益增加的监管和消费者审视。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Alibaba, EchoStar, Micron & more
summary: Multiple stocks moved sharply in premarket trading, with notable movements in Alibaba, EchoStar, Micron, and other companies. These early movers often set the tone for broader market trends throughout the trading day.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前波动最大的股票：阿里巴巴、EchoStar、美光等
zh.summary: 多只股票在盘前交易中大幅波动，包括阿里巴巴、EchoStar、美光和其他公司的显著波动。这些早期波动通常为整个交易日的更广泛市场趋势定调。

title: SoftBank posts $46 billion gain at Vision Fund driven mainly by massive OpenAI bet
summary: SoftBank recorded a $46 billion annual gain at its Vision Fund, primarily driven by the surging value of its OpenAI investment stake. The windfall demonstrates substantial returns from early backing of the AI company.
content: SoftBank booked a yearly gain of $46 billion at its Vision Fund driven in large part by the huge rise in value of its investment in OpenAI.

zh.title: 软银愿景基金年度收益460亿美元，主要由巨额OpenAI投资驱动
zh.summary: 软银在其愿景基金中录得460亿美元的年度收益，主要由其OpenAI投资股份价值飙升驱动。这笔意外之财展示了早期支持这家AI公司的丰厚回报。

title: What do Japanese crisps have to do with the Iran war?
summary: Calbee, a Japanese crisp manufacturer, is switching to black and white packaging due to disrupted ink supplies caused by the Strait of Hormuz closure linked to geopolitical tensions. The disruption illustrates how Middle East conflicts affect global supply chains.
content: Calbee says it will temporarily switch to black and white packaging as ink supplies have been disrupted by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 日本薯片和伊朗战争有什么关系？
zh.summary: 日本薯片制造商Calbee由于霍尔木兹海峡关闭导致的油墨供应中断而改用黑白包装，该关闭与地缘政治紧张局势有关。这种中断说明了中东冲突如何影响全球供应链。

title: European markets to open higher as focus returns to earnings; Siemens unveils $7 billion buyback
summary: European stocks are expected to open higher Wednesday, reversing Tuesday's negative sentiment as investor focus shifts to corporate earnings. German manufacturing giant Siemens announced a $7 billion share buyback program.
content: European stocks are expected to buck the negative sentiment seen in Tuesday's session by opening higher on Wednesday.

zh.title: 欧洲市场看涨，投资者关注点转向财报；西门子推出70亿美元回购计划
zh.summary: 欧洲股票预计周三高开，扭转周二的负面情绪，因为投资者的关注点转向公司财报。德国制造业巨头西门子宣布了一项70亿美元的股票回购计划。

title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: Starmer’s EU push faces a harsh political reality
summary: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer is focusing on resetting relations with Europe as a strategy to revive declining political popularity. The effort comes as his administration faces domestic political headwinds.
content: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer has alighted on resetting relations with Europe as a way of reviving his flagging popularity.

zh.title: CNBC的英国交易通讯：斯塔默的欧盟推进面临严峻政治现实
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默正专注于重置与欧洲的关系，以此作为扭转政治人气下滑的战略。这一努力进行之际，其政府面临国内政治逆风。

title: Buy these 'cheap' stocks, Barclays says, as luxury's 'self-help stories' pay off
summary: Barclays identifies buying opportunities in luxury stocks that have been depressed by Middle East conflict concerns. The bank believes luxury companies' operational improvements will drive recovery.
content: The conflict in the Middle East has weighed heavily on the world's biggest luxury stocks, but Barclays sees a buying opportunity.

zh.title: 巴克莱表示：买入这些"廉价"股票，因为奢侈品的"自救故事"得到回报
zh.summary: 巴克莱发现了因中东冲突担忧而被压低的奢侈品股票的买入机会。该银行认为奢侈品公司的运营改善将推动复苏。

title: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
summary: Major tech companies are launching smart glasses despite widespread privacy concerns from consumers and advocates. Meta's smart glasses are experiencing strong sales despite the ongoing privacy debate.
content: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.

zh.title: 智能眼镜是"隐私侵犯"——Meta的产品销售却比以往任何时候都好
zh.summary: 尽管消费者和倡导者普遍关切隐私问题，主要科技公司仍在推出智能眼镜。Meta的智能眼镜尽管存在持续的隐私争议，销售仍在强劲增长。

title: Jensen Huang joins Trump's China trip after the U.S. president called the Nvidia CEO
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang has joined President Trump's trip to China after a personal call from the president. His last-minute inclusion highlights the significance of the U.S.-China tech relationship during the summit.
content: The U.S. chipmaker executive was not included in earlier lists of business leaders participating in President Donald Trump's trip to China this week.

zh.title: Jensen Huang在美国总统亲自致电后加入特朗普的中国之行
zh.summary: 英伟达首席执行官Jensen Huang在美国总统亲自致电后加入了特朗普的中国之行。他的临时加入凸显了峰会期间美中科技关系的重要性。

title: Morgan Stanley boosts price targets for China indexes, sees upside through 2Q 2027
summary: Morgan Stanley raised price targets for Chinese stock indexes, projecting upside through the second quarter of 2027. The firm cites China's competitive supply chain advantages in high-end power and green technology sectors.
content: China's highly competitive supply chain also makes the country best positioned in the high-end power and green tech space, the strategists said.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利提高中国指数目标价格，看好至2027年第二季度
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利提高了中国股票指数的目标价格，预计到2027年第二季度将持续上升。该公司指出中国在高端电力和绿色技术领域的供应链竞争优势。

title: For Chinese exporters, Iran worries eclipse tariff woes as Trump, Xi prepare to meet
summary: Chinese exporters are increasingly concerned about Iran instability overshadowing tariff worries ahead of the Trump-Xi summit. Both nations are expected to coordinate efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore regional stability.
content: Heading into the summit, Beijing and Washington will likely reaffirm their shared intention to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore stability in the region.

zh.title: 对于中国出口商来说，伊朗担忧随着特朗普与习近平准备会面而超过了关税担忧
zh.summary: 随着特朗普与习近平峰会的临近，中国出口商越来越担心伊朗不稳定性会掩盖关税问题。两国预计将协调努力重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并恢复地区稳定。

title: Plans for Australia's first Trump Tower scrapped due to 'toxic' brand, developer says
summary: Plans for a 91-storey Trump Tower in Queensland have been abandoned by the developer, who cited the Trump brand as "toxic" for the project. The building would have been Australia's tallest structure.
content: The 91-storey luxury hotel on the Gold Coast in Queensland was meant to be Australia's tallest building.

zh.title: 澳大利亚首座特朗普大厦计划因"有毒"品牌被放弃，开发商表示
zh.summary: 昆士兰州一栋91层高的特朗普大厦计划已被开发商放弃，开发商称特朗普品牌对该项目来说是"有毒的"。这栋建筑本将成为澳大利亚最高的建筑。

title: My retirement fund is like an AI version of me. It keeps working when I’m not able to.
summary: An investor compares automated retirement fund management to AI that works independently. The piece emphasizes the importance of proactive personal financial management. This highlights how technology enables passive wealth building.
content: “Not taking care of your money becomes, in a visceral sense, not taking care of yourself.”

zh.title: 我的退休基金就像我的AI版本。在我无法工作时，它仍在继续运作。
zh.summary: 一位投资者将自动化退休基金管理与独立运作的AI进行比较。这篇文章强调了主动个人财务管理的重要性。这突出了技术如何促进被动财富积累。
